notes: L0 = zero-shot compositional; N_PRED=1; no refine loops. Stage 1/2 artifacts (features.json, seed.c, poc.c) were carried over from dgfp-5-rep2 (identical seed slice and POC; verifier-v1 rebuilt for rep5 and passed with OK(F1.acq=1 F1.rel=1 F3.goto=3 F5.ret=12 F2.if=3)). Single predicate isMillisecondBusyDelay recognises mdelay() calls; sleepable/atomic context tests inlined in assembly where-clause. final.ql compiles under codeql-2.25.6 and fires 3 times on POC (_buggy, some_driver_resume_tp2, some_driver_probe_tp3), silent on _fixed/tn*/fp*. Missed some_driver_work_handler_tp1 due to the %handler% blacklist filter overreaching, but per L0 spec accept criterion is compile-success only (pair-wise oracle is C3-specific).
